summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OpenClaw Installer Dashboard iteration 2. Successfully tested all 19 backend API endpoints and 5 new tool pages (Profiles, Share Config, Marketplace, Analytics, Desktop App). All major features working including WebSocket live install, bulletproof PowerShell script generation, iOS integration in marketplace, and enhanced analytics dashboard.

minor_issues.issue: Script content validation shows minor content mismatch in existing test
minor_issues.impact: Low - script generation works but test expects different content format

minor_issues.issue: Using text* selectors which are not supported
minor_issues.note: Testing workaround used, functionality confirmed working

passed_tests: All 19 backend API endpoints responding correctly
GET /api/health returns version 2.0.0
GET /api/system-check returns 10+ system dependency checks
GET /api/skills returns 30 skills with categories
GET /api/marketplace returns 12 marketplace skills with 9 iOS skills
GET /api/analytics/summary returns demo timeline with 7 data points
GET /api/security-presets returns standard/paranoid/permissive presets
GET /api/install-methods returns 3 installation methods
GET /api/ai-providers returns 5 AI providers
POST/GET/DELETE /api/profiles - full CRUD operations working
POST /api/share and GET /api/share/{id} - share config functionality
POST /api/batch and GET /api/batch - batch installation for teams
POST /api/analytics/track - event tracking working
POST /api/validate-key - API key validation with proper prefixes
POST /api/save-config - configuration persistence
POST /api/generate-script - bulletproof PowerShell script with retry logic
Welcome page navigation and feature display
Sidebar with all 7 wizard steps + 5 tool pages correctly rendered
System Check page with 11 dependency checks and rescan functionality
Profiles page: create, save, delete, import/export functionality
Share Config page: generate links, batch install, team member management
Marketplace page: 12 skills, iOS integration banner, platform filters, search
Analytics page: 5 KPI cards, installation timeline, method/provider stats
Desktop App page with Electron build instructions
Review page: bulletproof install badge, WebSocket live installation progress
WebSocket /api/ws/install - real-time installation progress with 17% completion shown
All navigation between wizard steps and tool pages working smoothly
UI design: professional dark theme, proper spacing, interactive elements
